_comment_slug: TODO: lowercase, kebab-case. Must match the directory name under src/networks/.
_comment_name: TODO: human-readable name, e.g. 'eBay Partner Network'.
name: Template Network
_comment_base_url: TODO: production API base URL. Must be a valid URL.
_comment_auth_model: TODO: one of bearer | oauth2 | basic | custom. Must match the authModel in adapter.ts META.
_comment_env_vars: TODO: array of env-var names, each /^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$/. Non-empty. Must match the fields your auth.ts reads via requireCredential and the fields exposed by setupSteps().
_comment_setup_time: TODO: honest estimate in minutes for a user who already has the dashboard open.
_comment_setup_approval: TODO: true if the network gates API access behind manual approval. If true, also set setup_approval_days_typical.
_comment_known_limitations: TODO: array of specific, verifiable limitations. 'No click data via the public API' is fine if true; vague hedging is not. Mirror META.knownLimitations in adapter.ts.
_comment_claim_status: TODO: one of production | partial | experimental | unsupported. Fresh adapters ship 'experimental' or 'partial'. Promotion to 'production' requires a live acceptance test against a real publisher account.
_comment_adapter_version: TODO: semver starting at 0.1.0. Bump patch on bug fixes, minor on capability additions.
_comment_last_verified: TODO: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. The date you last ran the live diagnostic against a real account. Bumped by Task 2 (fix) and Task 4 (setup docs).
_comment_supports_brand_ops: TODO: false at v0.1 for every network. Lights up in v0.2 when a network implements listPublishers / listPublisherSectors.
_comment_docs_url: TODO: optional but include where possible. Link to the API documentation home.
